name: Magisters' Terrace
tagline: Arcane law, Spellbreaker duels, void twins, and Degentrius volleyball.

bosses.name: Arcanotron Custos
bosses.summary: Soak Energy Orbs during Refueling Protocol; dispel Ethereal Shackles; dodge Arcane Expulsion residue.

abilities.name: Refueling Protocol
abilities.note: Soak orbs before boss eats them; Unstable Energy stacks hurt.

abilities.name: Arcane Expulsion
abilities.note: Knockback + floor pools — don't stand in residue.

tips: Library tome: +5% haste Arcane Empowerment buff.

bosses.name: Seranel Sunlash
bosses.summary: Runic Mark → Suppression Zone for Feedback; silence dodge on Wave of Silence; purge Hastening Ward.

abilities.name: Runic Mark
abilities.note: Enter zone for Feedback; dodge barrage after.

abilities.name: Wave of Silence
abilities.note: Hide under Suppression Zone before cast ends.

abilities.name: Hastening Ward
abilities.note: Purge or tank CDs through boss enrage-speed.

tips: Null Reaction stacks make dodging harder — reset cleanly.

bosses.name: Gemellus
bosses.summary: Triplicate clones share health; Neural Link hug correct copy; dodge Cosmic Radiation during Astral Grasp.

abilities.name: Triplicate
abilities.note: Cleaving all copies speeds kill; spawns at 100% and 50%.

abilities.name: Neural Link
abilities.note: Stack true copy to drop shield.

abilities.name: Astral Grasp
abilities.note: Move fast — Cosmic Radiation melee aura.

tips: Healer: Cosmic Sting → Void Secretions follow-up.

bosses.name: Degentrius
bosses.summary: Unstable Energy orb passing — miss = Void Destruction stacks; avoid Void Torrent pizza lines.

abilities.name: Unstable Energy volleyball
abilities.note: Each player covers a slice; dropping orb stacks raid wipe debuff.

abilities.name: Hulking Fragment
abilities.note: Tank aim away from raid; Umbral Splinters leave ichor.

tips: Personal defensives when soaking multiple essences.

dangerousPacks.name: Arcane law trash
dangerousPacks.why: Rule-breaker mechanics vary by mob type — read nameplates.
handling: Use IV dungeon guide trash section per pull.
